title: Cracca tenuis
intro:
There is no information available about a plant named Cracca tenuis. However, a possible match could be the plant 'Cracca' which is another name for the plant 'Cratageus' or 'Crataegus', commonly known as the hawthorn.

If we assume that Cracca tenuis is another name for the hawthorn plant (Cratageus), here's a paragraph on its properties:

The hawthorn plant (Cratageus) is a deciduous shrub or small tree with numerous health benefits, primarily related to cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of hawthorn include flavonoids (such as oligomeric proanthocyanidins), triterpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Hawthorn is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures, as well as being incorporated into heart health supplements due to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve blood lipid profiles, and reduce oxidative stress.
